summary: Mexico beat South Africa 2-0, with J. Quiñones (9') and R. Jiménez (67') scoring. South Korea won 2-1 against Czechia. L. Krejcí scored for Czechia (59'), but South Korea responded with goals from H. In-Beom (67') and O. Hyeon-Gyu (80') to claim victory.

World Cup results saw Canada draw 1-1 with Bosnia-Herzegovina; J. Lukic scored for Bosnia-Herzegovina, C. Larin for Canada. The United States defeated Paraguay 4-1. D. Bobadilla, F. Balogun (twice), and G. Reyna found the net for the USA, while Maurício scored Paraguay's lone goal.

In World Cup action, Qatar drew 1-1 with Switzerland, M. Muheim scoring late for Qatar. Brazil also drew 1-1 against Morocco, with I. Saibari and Vinícius Júnior on the scoresheet. Scotland secured a 1-0 victory over Haiti, J. McGinn netting the winner.

Australia defeated Türkiye 2-0, while Germany secured a dominant 7-1 victory over Curaçao. Sweden also had a big win, beating Tunisia 5-1. The Netherlands drew 2-2 with Japan, and Ivory Coast edged past Ecuador 1-0 with a late goal.

World Cup action saw Spain and Cape Verde draw 0-0. Belgium drew 1-1 with Egypt, Ashour and Hany scoring. Saudi Arabia also drew 1-1 with Uruguay, Al-Amri and Araújo netting. Iran and New Zealand shared a 2-2 draw, E. Just scoring twice for New Zealand.

France defeated Senegal 3-1, Mbappé scoring twice, Barcola once; Mbaye netted for Senegal. Norway beat Iraq 4-1, Haaland (2), Østigard, and A. Hussein (Norway) scoring. Iraq's goal by Hussein. Messi's hat-trick secured Argentina a 3-0 win over Algeria.

Austria defeated Jordan 3-1, with goals from Schmid and Al-Arab. England secured a 4-2 victory over Croatia, featuring goals from Kane, Bellingham, and Rashford. Colombia beat Uzbekistan 3-1. Ghana edged Panama 1-0. Portugal and Congo DR drew 1-1, Neves scoring for Portugal.

World Cup results saw Czechia draw 1-1 with South Africa, M. Sadílek scoring. Switzerland beat Bosnia-Herzegovina 4-1, J. Manzambi (2) and R. Vargas scoring. Canada thrashed Qatar 6-0, J. David netting a hat-trick. Mexico secured a 1-0 win against South Korea, L. Romo scoring.

United States defeated Australia 2-0. Morocco secured a 1-0 victory over Scotland. Brazil dominated Haiti with a 3-0 win, featuring a brace from M. Cunha. Paraguay also triumphed 1-0 against Türkiye. Early goals were key in Morocco's and Paraguay's narrow wins.

The Netherlands secured a dominant 5-1 victory over Sweden, with Brobbey and Gakpo each scoring twice. Germany defeated Ivory Coast 2-1, thanks to two goals from Undav, including a late winner. The match between Ecuador and Curaçao concluded in a goalless 0-0 draw.

Japan defeated Tunisia 4-0, with Ueda scoring twice. Spain also won 4-0 against Saudi Arabia, Oyarzabal netting two. Belgium and Iran played out a goalless draw. Uruguay drew 2-2 with Cape Verde. Egypt beat New Zealand 3-1, Salah among the scorers.

Argentina defeated Austria 2-0, with Lionel Messi scoring both goals. France secured a 3-0 victory over Iraq, featuring a brace from Kylian Mbappé and a goal from Ousmane Dembélé. Norway edged out Senegal 3-2, thanks to Erling Haaland's two goals. Algeria beat Jordan 2-1.

Portugal thrashed Uzbekistan 5-0, with C. Ronaldo scoring twice, alongside goals from N. Mendes, A. Nematov, and R. Leão. England drew 0-0 with Ghana. Croatia beat Panama 1-0, A. Budimir scoring. Colombia also won 1-0 against Congo DR, D. Muñoz finding the net.

Bosnia-Herzegovina defeated Qatar 3-1, and Switzerland beat Canada 2-1. Morocco drew 2-2 with Haiti. Brazil secured a 2-0 win over Scotland, with Vinícius Júnior scoring both goals. Czechia and Mexico, along with South Africa and South Korea, played out goalless draws.
